history.note: Re-observed at 258aeac0: the portability goal frozen TASK-095/FGAP-180 was filed for is realized by packages/pi-context-cli — a published, globally-installable pi-context binary (npm i -g @davidorex/pi-context-cli; promote:cli/release auto-promote for the in-monorepo operator) whose command set auto-tracks the pi-context op-registry by reflection with per-op --help — a different mechanism than the wrapper-elevation design the frozen task specified. scripts/orchestrator wrappers remain (55 files) as the in-monorepo dual-surface, which the finding scopes out as working-as-designed. The live substrate has no carrier for the 3-layer FGAP-180/181/182 framing ('CLI elevation' = 0 hits in tasks/features/framework-gaps) and reuses the TASK-095 id for an unrelated Bash-chokepoint task, but the superseding CLI matches the governing intents IN-140 (pi-context as a first-rate installed command) and IN-15 (CLI commands auto-track code); the frozen design, not the intent, is what lapsed.
